nodes.name: AdvancedAnalysis.tsx
nodes.summary: Election analysis dashboard tab hosting scatter plots, ranking tables, and change-over-time visualizations for district (Kreis) election data, with search, region filtering, and gain/loss leaderboards.

nodes.name: ChangeAnalysisCharts.tsx
nodes.summary: Chart components rendering vote-change analysis: top gains/losses bar charts, a delta histogram, and per-state average change bars for election comparisons.

nodes.name: ChangeMap.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive SVG choropleth map coloring districts by vote-share change between two elections, with hover tooltips, zoom-to-region, and a diverging legend.

nodes.name: CompareMode.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-region comparison view that fetches election results for several Kreise and renders side-by-side bar charts, time series, and difference tables.

nodes.name: DifferenceTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Table comparing per-party vote shares across multiple selected regions, color-coding the spread between min and max values per party.

nodes.name: DistrictAnalysis.tsx
nodes.summary: Deep-dive single-district (Kreis) analysis page combining historical tables, party bar charts, percentile bars, and election-type comparison line charts.

nodes.name: ElectionMap.tsx
nodes.summary: Interactive SVG choropleth of Germany's districts colored by party share or turnout, with hover tooltips, zoom-to-region, and a metric-aware legend.

nodes.name: HistoricalTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Table presenting a district's party vote shares across historical election years, highlighting the winning party per row.

nodes.name: KreisAutocomplete.tsx
nodes.summary: Autocomplete search input for German districts (Kreise) that filters GeoJSON features by name and exposes a reusable hit-filtering helper.

nodes.name: MapMode.tsx
nodes.summary: Map-centric election view orchestrating the choropleth map, metric/type selectors, district search, and the advanced analysis tabs.

nodes.name: PartyBarChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Horizontal bar chart rendering a single region's party vote shares for one election year, using shared party colors.

nodes.name: PartyToggles.tsx
nodes.summary: Toggle-button group letting users enable or disable individual parties in district charts, with readable text contrast against party colors.

nodes.name: PercentileBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Percentile bar widget positioning a district's value within a min/max range to show relative standing among all districts.

nodes.name: RadarCompare.tsx
nodes.summary: Radar chart comparing multiple regions across fixed party-share axes, with localized subject labels.

nodes.name: RankingTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Sortable ranking table listing districts by a metric, deriving the Bundesland (state) from each district's AGS code.

nodes.name: RegionPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Side panel showing a selected region's election detail: per-party bars, time series across years, and metadata, fetched from the API.

nodes.name: ScatterPlot.tsx
nodes.summary: Configurable scatter plot correlating two district metrics with selectable axes and party/state color modes, plus an interactive color legend.

nodes.name: TimeSeriesChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-party line chart plotting vote shares over election years, supporting comparison overlays between regions.

nodes.name: electionUiUtils.tsx
nodes.summary: Shared UI helpers for the elections module: election-type constants, themed select styling, localized type labels, AGS normalization, and section-title rendering.

nodes.name: mapColors.ts
nodes.summary: Color-scale functions mapping election metrics (party share, turnout, vote change) to fill colors for choropleth maps.

nodes.name: mapGeometry.ts
nodes.summary: GeoJSON projection utilities converting district coordinates into SVG path data and building a lookup map of district geometries.

nodes.name: normalizeWahlen.ts
nodes.summary: Normalization helpers converting raw API election values into display percentages and resolving district display names.

nodes.name: partyColors.ts
nodes.summary: Central palette and labels for German parties and federal states, with light/dark theme variants and AGS-to-state-color helpers.

nodes.name: regionBarRows.ts
nodes.summary: Helper transforming a region's election row into bar-chart data using shared party colors and normalization utilities.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Shared TypeScript type definitions for election map rows, distinguishing API-shaped rows from normalized display rows.

nodes.name: AdvancedAnalysis
nodes.summary: Main analysis tab component wiring scatter/ranking/change views, managing tab state, region search, and gain/loss leaderboards.

nodes.name: selectStyle
nodes.summary: Builds themed inline styles for native select elements used in the analysis toolbar.

nodes.name: ChangeGainsLossesBarCharts
nodes.summary: Renders side-by-side bar charts of the largest vote-share gains and losses across districts.

nodes.name: ChangeDeltaHistogram
nodes.summary: Renders a histogram binning districts by their vote-change delta.

nodes.name: ChangeStateAverageBars
nodes.summary: Renders per-state average vote-change bars aggregated from district rows.

nodes.name: ChangeMap
nodes.summary: SVG choropleth map coloring districts by vote-share change with hover tooltips and zoom-to-region.

nodes.name: CompareMode
nodes.summary: Multi-region comparison view fetching and rendering side-by-side election results, time series, and difference tables.

nodes.name: DifferenceTable
nodes.summary: Table comparing per-party vote shares across regions with color-coded spreads.

nodes.name: spanColor
nodes.summary: Maps a value's position within a min/max spread to a color intensity.

nodes.name: DistrictAnalysis
nodes.summary: Single-district deep-dive page combining historical tables, party charts, percentile bars, and type-comparison line charts.

nodes.name: ElectionTypeCompareLineLegend
nodes.summary: Renders the legend for the election-type comparison line chart.

nodes.name: winnerPartyKey
nodes.summary: Determines the winning party key for an election row by comparing party shares.

nodes.name: ElectionMap
nodes.summary: SVG choropleth of districts colored by party share or turnout, with hover tooltips and zoom.

nodes.name: ElectionMapLegend
nodes.summary: Metric-aware legend for the election choropleth, switching between party-share and turnout scales.

nodes.name: HistoricalTable
nodes.summary: Table of a district's party vote shares across historical years with winner highlighting.

nodes.name: winnerKey
nodes.summary: Determines the winning party key for a historical election row.

nodes.name: filterKreiseSearchHits
nodes.summary: Filters GeoJSON district features by a search query, returning ranked name hits.

nodes.name: KreisAutocomplete
nodes.summary: Autocomplete input component for searching and selecting German districts.

nodes.name: selectInputStyle
nodes.summary: Builds themed inline styles for the autocomplete input element.

nodes.name: MapMode
nodes.summary: Map view orchestrating the choropleth, metric/type selectors, district search, and analysis tabs.

nodes.name: sparseKreisBannerText
nodes.summary: Builds a localized banner message warning of sparse district data coverage.

nodes.name: typeLabel
nodes.summary: Returns a localized label for an election type.

nodes.name: PartyBarChart
nodes.summary: Horizontal bar chart of a region's party vote shares for one election year.

nodes.name: PartyToggles
nodes.summary: Toggle-button group for enabling/disabling parties in district charts.

nodes.name: PercentileBar
nodes.summary: Percentile bar widget showing a district's standing within a min/max range.

nodes.name: RadarCompare
nodes.summary: Radar chart comparing regions across fixed party-share axes.

nodes.name: RankingTable
nodes.summary: Sortable ranking table of districts by a metric with state derivation from AGS codes.

nodes.name: RegionPanel
nodes.summary: Side panel rendering a selected region's election detail with bars, time series, and metadata.

nodes.name: rowToBarData
nodes.summary: Transforms an election row into per-party bar-chart data entries.

nodes.name: ScatterPlot
nodes.summary: Configurable scatter plot correlating two district metrics with selectable axes and color modes.

nodes.name: ScatterColorLegend
nodes.summary: Interactive color legend for the scatter plot's party/state color modes.

nodes.name: scatterAxisLabel
nodes.summary: Returns a localized axis label for a scatter plot metric key.

nodes.name: TimeSeriesChart
nodes.summary: Multi-party line chart plotting vote shares over election years with comparison overlays.

nodes.name: selectCss
nodes.summary: Builds themed CSS for native select elements in the elections UI.

nodes.name: typeLabelT
nodes.summary: Returns a localized label for an election type via the translation function.

nodes.name: sectionTitle
nodes.summary: Renders a styled section-title element for the elections layout.

nodes.name: turnoutColor
nodes.summary: Maps a turnout value within a range to a sequential fill color.

nodes.name: changeColor
nodes.summary: Maps a vote-change delta to a diverging fill color around a neutral midpoint.

nodes.name: mapFillColor
nodes.summary: Dispatches to the appropriate color scale based on the active map metric.

nodes.name: projectCoords
nodes.summary: Projects geographic coordinates into SVG pixel space within a bounding box.

nodes.name: featureToPath
nodes.summary: Converts a GeoJSON feature's geometry into an SVG path data string.

nodes.name: buildKreiseMap
nodes.summary: Builds a lookup map of district SVG path data and bounds from a GeoJSON collection.

nodes.name: resolveKreisDisplayName
nodes.summary: Resolves a district's display name from AGS code, name map, and API-provided name.

nodes.name: normalizeMapRow
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw API map row into a display-ready row with percentages and names.

nodes.name: regionRowToSingleResultBars
nodes.summary: Transforms a region's election row into single-result bar-chart data.
